roleSummary: This role owns end-to-end product delivery for growth experiments, requiring strong execution and stakeholder alignment.

topPriorities.evidenceQuote: You will design and execute rapid A/B tests across the funnel.
Partner closely with engineering, design, data, and marketing.
Track and report KPI movement tied to each initiative.

yourAngle: Position yourself as a builder who turns ambiguous growth problems into measurable outcomes with fast iteration.
strengthsToEmphasize: Linking roadmap choices to KPI impact

moveUp: Bullet showing 18% activation lift from onboarding optimization
addOrRephrase: Rephrase product bullets to emphasize experiment cadence and impact
Add one bullet on KPI dashboard ownership
deemphasize: Legacy maintenance tasks without clear business outcomes

gapReframes.gap: No direct ownership of paid acquisition
gapReframes.reframe: Highlight adjacent funnel optimization experience and measurable conversion lifts.
Emphasize transferable stakeholder coordination and scalable process design.

closingLine: I’d bring a fast, evidence-driven execution style that helps the team learn quickly and compound wins.
